context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct modern ElevenLabs JavaScript package, the right client class and method, and handles the streaming audio response properly when building a Node.js sound-effects generator.

checklist.name: Correct npm package
checklist.description: The package.json or install command uses `@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js`, NOT the bare `elevenlabs` package

checklist.name: Correct import
checklist.description: Imports `ElevenLabsClient` from `@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js` (not from `elevenlabs` or another package)

checklist.name: Correct client class
checklist.description: Instantiates `new ElevenLabsClient(...)` — not `ElevenLabs(...)` or any other class name

checklist.name: Streaming output handling
checklist.description: Saves audio by piping the response to a write stream (e.g. `audio.pipe(createWriteStream(...))`) rather than treating the response as a complete buffer

checklist.name: Environment variable auth
checklist.description: Uses `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` environment variable for authentication (client created without hardcoded key, or with explicit env var reference)

checklist.name: Descriptive prompt text
checklist.description: The sound effect prompt passed to the API combines at least two descriptive elements (e.g. action + material, sound + context) rather than a single generic word

checklist.name: Error handling present
checklist.description: API call is wrapped in a try/catch block

checklist.name: No deprecated package used
checklist.description: The code does NOT import or install the bare `elevenlabs` npm package anywhere
